# flags-service

> QARoom flags-service: per-community feature-flag resolution and gradual rollout (Milestone 5).

A flag's value is the current state of an XState rollout machine, advanced through explicit
events. The machine-readable contract is `openapi.yaml` (OpenAPI 3.0, generated from Zod);
published events are described in `asyncapi.yaml`. Live capabilities at
`GET /system/capabilities` (MCP-tool-shaped), observable state at `GET /system/state`. Every
error is RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` with `retryable`, `next_actions`, `failure_domain`.

## Operations
- GET  /api/communities/{communityId}/flags/{flagKey}          — resolveFlag
- GET  /api/communities/{communityId}/flags                    — listFlags
- POST /api/communities/{communityId}/flags/{flagKey}/rollout  — advanceRollout (mutating; Idempotency-Key required)
- GET  /system/state                                           — getSystemState
- GET  /system/capabilities                                    — getSystemCapabilities

## Events
- qaroom.flags.flag.{community_id}.changed — FlagStateChangedEvent (rollout transitioned)

## Docs
- Contract: ./openapi.yaml · ./asyncapi.yaml
- Agent reference: ./AGENTS.md
- Repo conventions: /AGENTS.md, /docs
